x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining maximum and minimum amounts for a single transfer, daily transfers, or cumulative periods.

Comment:
Examples:

Max €5,000 per transaction

Daily cumulative limit of €10,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Time Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules specifying the latest time for processing transfers for same-day execution and expected completion times.

Comment:
Examples:

Transfers submitted after 5 PM are processed the next business day

International wire: 13 business days processing time

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee and Charge Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining fees, commissions, or service charges applied to the transfer.

Comment:
Examples:

Domestic transfer fee: €2

International wire fee: €15 + currency conversion cost

x-enumeration-literals.name: Currency Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for handling currencies, exchange rates, and conversion costs for transfers in foreign currencies.

Comment:
Examples:

Currency conversion based on banks daily rate

Only supported currencies can be used

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approval Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining who must approve the transfer, authentication requirements, and limits requiring additional signatories.

Comment:
Examples:

Two-factor authentication required

Manager approval for transfers > €10,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules ensuring transfers comply with legal, regulatory, or bank policy requirements.

Comment:
Examples:

KYC (Know Your Customer) verification must be completed

AML (Anti-Money Laundering) checks mandatory

Transfers blocked for sanctioned accounts

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancellation Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules governing when and how transfers can be reversed or canceled.

Comment:
Examples:

Transfers canceled only before cut-off time

Reversal allowed in case of duplicate payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules specifying how funds are debited, credited, and settled between accounts or banks.

Comment:
Examples:

Real-time debit and credit for instant transfers

T+1 settlement for domestic ACH transfers

x-enumeration-literals.name: Notification Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for notifying parties about transfer status, confirmations, and errors.

Comment:
Examples:

SMS/email alert on completion

Daily transfer report for corporate customers

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining responsibility and liability in case of errors, delays, or fraud.

Comment:
Examples:

Bank liable for errors in processing

Customer liable for incorrect beneficiary details
